description: Renovate complements Dependabot (which already handles pip / npm / github-actions ecosystems via .github/dependabot.yml). This config focuses on what Dependabot can't see: SHA-pinned scanner binaries downloaded into the Dockerfile via `curl | sha256sum --check`. See `.agent/devsecops_playbook.md` § 'Bumping the bundled Semgrep rule pack' for the manual review procedure once a Renovate PR lands.

customManagers.description: Dockerfile-pinned scanner binaries (Bandit / Semgrep / Gitleaks / OSV-Scanner). Each line is `curl ... <fixed-version-URL>` followed by `echo "<sha256>  <path>" | sha256sum --check --strict`. Renovate watches the URL for a new release and bumps both the URL and the SHA in the same PR.

packageRules.description: Group all scanner-binary updates into one PR per release cadence so reviewers can sanity-check the SHA bump procedure (devsecops_playbook.md F4) once per cycle.
Major version bumps for scanner binaries deserve manual review — they often change CLI flags or output format, which the wrapper code may need to follow.
